sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: MGM RESORTS INTERNATIONAL ANNOUNCES COMPLETION OF THE SALE OF THE OPERATIONS OF MGM NORTHFIELD PARK
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International announced the completion of the sale of MGM Northfield Park's operations to Clairvest Group Inc. for $546 million in cash. The transaction is part of MGM Resorts' strategy to divest non-strategic regional assets, with the proceeds intended to strengthen its balance sheet, invest in growth, and return capital to shareholders. The sale also includes an amendment to MGM Resorts' master lease agreement with VICI Properties, reducing annual rent by $53 million.

feed.title: VICI adds a 14th tenant as $53M Northfield Park lease moves to Clairvest
feed.summary: VICI Properties Inc. announced a new triple-net lease agreement with Clairvest for MGM Northfield Park following MGM Resorts' sale of its operations there. This agreement adds Clairvest as VICI's 14th tenant, with an initial annual base rent of $53.0 million, and maintains VICI's aggregate rent collection despite a corresponding reduction in the MGM Master Lease. The deal diversifies VICI's tenant base and leverages Clairvest's extensive experience in the gaming sector.

feed.title: VICI Properties Inc. Enters Into Lease Agreement With Clairvest Related to MGM Northfield Park in Northfield, OH
feed.summary: VICI Properties Inc. has entered into a new triple-net lease agreement with an affiliate of Clairvest related to MGM Northfield Park. This agreement follows MGM Resorts International's sale of MGM Northfield Park's operations to Clairvest and results in Clairvest becoming VICI's 14th tenant. The Northfield Park Lease has an initial annual base rent of $53.0 million, and VICI's aggregate rent collected will remain unchanged as the MGM Master Lease was amended to reflect a corresponding reduction.

feed.title: We Energies Foundation donates nearly $400,000 to protect the environment
feed.summary: The We Energies Foundation donated nearly $400,000 in 2025 to over 35 environmental nonprofits across Wisconsin, emphasizing its commitment to conservation. The foundation supports various organizations like the Natural Resources Foundation, Riveredge Nature Center, Schlitz Audubon Nature Center, and Trees for Tomorrow, funding land restoration, educational programs, and species protection. We Energies also contributes directly to environmental efforts, including endangered species restoration, monarch butterfly conservation, and investments in renewable energy.

feed.title: PPG Industries shareholders approve board nominees and incentive plan at annual meeting
feed.summary: PPG Industries Inc. shareholders approved the election of 12 directors, an executive compensation advisory resolution, and the appointment of PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent accounting firm at their 2026 Annual Meeting. They also approved the 2026 Omnibus Incentive Plan, though a proposal for an independent board chair was not passed. The company also announced performance-based stock unit awards for executives and recently reported a 6% increase in Q1 2026 adjusted EPS and a price increase for its coatings products.

feed.title: NRG Energy Inc. stock underperforms Tuesday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: NRG Energy Inc.'s stock experienced a decline on Tuesday, underperforming its competitors. The stock closed at $77.29, down $1.82 from the previous day, while the S&P 500 remained relatively flat.

feed.title: The Best Tool and Appliance Deals You Can Still Get Before Home Depot's Spring Sale Ends
feed.summary: Home Depot's "Spring Black Friday" sale is nearing its end on April 22nd, but customers still have a chance to snag significant discounts on various home improvement items. The article highlights last-minute deals on grills, outdoor power tools, patio furniture, appliances, and more. Featured products include a NexGrill propane gas grill, Ryobi pressure washer, LG French door refrigerator, and several tool combo kits from Rigid and Milwaukee.

feed.title: Ramaco Resources (METC) Gains 8.1% Following Goldman Sachs Upgra
feed.summary: Ramaco Resources (METC) saw an 8.1% stock price increase after Goldman Sachs upgraded its rating to Neutral with a $15 price target, citing improved metallurgical coal market conditions. Despite a strong GF Score™ of 79 indicating potential for long-term returns, the company faces financial challenges and significant insider selling, which investors should consider. While the upgrade reflects optimism for METC's EBITDA potential, its P/E ratio is inapplicable due to negative earnings, and its financial strength score is 5/10.

feed.title: Alexandria real estate EVP Hallie Kuhn sells $25,835 in stock
feed.summary: Hallie E. Kuhn, Executive Vice President of Capital Markets and Co-Lead of Life Science for ALEXANDRIA REAL ESTATE EQUITIES, INC. (NASDAQ:ARE), sold 536 shares of the company’s common stock for $25,835. The sale occurred on April 17, 2026, with shares trading at $48.20 each. Despite the sale, Ms. Kuhn directly owns 48,301 shares, and the stock is considered undervalued with a 5.88% dividend yield, according to InvestingPro.

feed.title: Jabil COO Andrew Priestley sells $1.05 million in company stock
feed.summary: Jabil Inc.'s COO, Andrew Priestley, sold 3,169 shares of company stock for $1.05 million. This transaction occurred as Jabil shares trade near their 52-week high, despite an InvestingPro analysis suggesting they are overvalued. The company recently reported strong Q2 fiscal 2026 results and several analysts have raised price targets, while Jabil also made a significant donation to St. Petersburg College for manufacturing training programs.

feed.title: Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX) Trading 3.7% Higher After Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX) shares increased by 3.7% after UBS Group raised its price target from $440 to $515, maintaining a "Neutral" rating. Multiple brokerages have also boosted targets, leading to a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average price target of $505.79. Seagate recently surpassed quarterly earnings expectations and provided strong Q3 2026 guidance, though concerns about insider selling, high debt-to-equity, and stretched valuation were noted.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) Stock Price Down 1.4% After Analyst Downgrade
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble (PG) stock fell 1.4% after Jefferies Financial Group lowered its price target from $179 to $175, maintaining a "buy" rating. Several other analysts have also trimmed their price targets, leading to a MarketBeat consensus of "Moderate Buy" with an average target of $162.79, indicating narrowed near-term upside and potential earnings risks. Insider selling of approximately 348,618 shares totaling $55.5 million has been observed in the last 90 days, despite the company increasing its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: MONDAY.COM LAWSUIT REMINDER: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C.
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. reminds investors in monday.com (MNDY) that a class action lawsuit has been filed. The lawsuit alleges that monday.com made misleading statements regarding its revenue outlook and growth projections, despite experiencing decelerating customer growth and longer sales cycles. Investors who purchased monday.com stock between September 17, 2025, and February 6, 2026, have until May 11, 2026, to apply to be appointed as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Booking Holdings Inc. to Present at the Barclays 18th Annual Americas Select Conference
feed.summary: Booking Holdings Inc. announced that its Chief Financial Officer, Ewout Steenbergen, will participate in a fireside chat at the Barclays 18th Annual Americas Select Conference in London on May 5th. A live audio cast of the presentation will be available online, with a replay accessible approximately 24 hours later. The company, known for platforms like Booking.com and Priceline, is a global leader in online travel services utilizing AI and machine learning.

feed.title: EQT Corporation (EQT) Releases Q1 2026 Earnings: Revenue +94.2%, EPS $2.36 Beats Estimates
feed.summary: EQT Corporation reported strong first-quarter 2026 earnings, with revenue soaring 94.2% to $3.38 billion and diluted EPS reaching $2.36, significantly beating analyst estimates. The company also saw substantial increases in gross profit, operating profit, and net income. Insider trading activity showed five sales and no purchases in the last six months, while hedge funds demonstrated mixed sentiment, with some increasing and others decreasing their positions.

feed.title: Mid Penn Bancorp : BANK SERVES AS TITLE SPONSOR FOR JUNIOR ACHIEVEMENT FUTURE BOUND IGNITE
feed.summary: Mid Penn Bank sponsored Junior Achievement of eastern Pennsylvania's Future Bound Ignite event, which took place on April 16 at Temple University's Fox School of Business. The event showcased high school students' entrepreneurial skills through the Junior Achievement Company Program, culminating in presentations and an expo. Mid Penn Bank team members, including Regional CRA Officer Ryan Thompson and Regional President Abe Ibrahim, served as judges and speakers, highlighting the bank's commitment to fostering youth entrepreneurship and community development.

feed.title: KLAC Maintained by UBS -- Price Target Raised to $1835
feed.summary: UBS analyst Timothy Arcuri has maintained a Neutral rating on KLA Corp (KLAC) but significantly raised the price target to $1835 from $1575, a 16.51% increase. Despite this positive adjustment, GuruFocus's GF Value™ indicates the stock is 92.7% overvalued, trading at $1789.44 against an intrinsic value of $928.81. KLAC exhibits strong fundamentals with a GF Score™ of 86/100, driven by excellent profitability and growth, but its high valuation and P/E ratio, significantly above its 5-year median, suggest caution for investors.

feed.title: Hasbro (HAS) Faces Purchase Order Halt from Supplier Aequs
feed.summary: Hasbro (HAS) is facing a potential disruption in its supply chain as supplier Aequs has reported that Hasbro plans to halt new purchase orders for engineered plastic components. This decision follows a recent hacking incident disclosed by Hasbro, and the reasons for the halt are currently unclear but could relate to operational stability or supplier adjustments. The news comes amidst significant insider selling of Hasbro stock and concerns about the company's growth despite its moderate GF Score™ and strong brand portfolio.

feed.title: WDC Maintained by UBS -- Price Target Raised to $350
feed.summary: UBS analyst Timothy Arcuri maintained a Neutral rating for Western Digital (WDC) but significantly raised its price target from $285 to $350, indicating potential growth recognition in the data storage market. Despite this, GuruFocus assesses WDC as significantly overvalued at $387.15 against a GF Value™ of $74.11, and insider selling activity also suggests caution for investors.

feed.title: Transdigm Group Insider Sold Shares Worth $12,817,572, According to a Recent SEC Filing
feed.summary: An insider at Transdigm Group (TDG) recently sold shares valued at $12,817,572, according to a recent SEC filing. This transaction follows other insider sales and company news, including debt offerings and acquisitions.

feed.title: Chubb stock sinks as Q1 GAAP EPS misses estimates amid rise in realized losses (CB:NYSE)
feed.summary: Chubb's stock declined after its Q1 GAAP EPS of $5.88 missed analyst estimates, despite being an increase from the previous year. The drop in stock price was also attributed to a rise in net realized losses during the quarter. Shares were down 2.21% in after-hours trading.

feed.title: Raymond James reiterates Market Perform on United Community Banks stock
feed.summary: Raymond James has reiterated a "Market Perform" rating on United Community Banks (NYSE: UCB) following the company's Q1 2026 results and the announcement of its acquisition of Peach State Bancshares. Despite first-quarter earnings matching consensus on a core EPS basis, pre-provision net revenue was softer. The acquisition is expected to be accretive to 2027 EPS.

feed.title: QQQ ETF Declines 0.4%
feed.summary: The QQQ ETF experienced a decline of 0.4%. This movement indicates a slight downward trend for the exchange-traded fund.

feed.title: Chubb Logs Higher 1Q Profit on Rising Premiums
feed.summary: Chubb reported a higher first-quarter profit driven by increased premiums across its commercial property, casualty, and global reinsurance businesses. The company's net written premiums saw double-digit growth, reflecting strong performance in various divisions. This positive financial outcome indicates robust activity and demand in its core insurance markets.

feed.title: ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF Options Spot-On: On April 21st, 194.76K Contracts Were Traded, With 1.42 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On April 21st, 2026, 194.76K ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF option contracts were traded. The open interest for these options currently stands at 1.42 million contracts.

feed.title: Prudential Financial Stock Is Falling on Report of Potential Misconduct at Japan Insurer
feed.summary: Prudential Financial Inc. stock experienced a 6% decline on Tuesday following reports of potential employee misconduct at its Japan-based subsidiary, Gibraltar Life Insurance. This news has led to investor concerns, impacting the financial services company's share price.

feed.title: PPG awards K. Henrik Bergstrom and Kevin Braun $1.5M target MSUs
feed.summary: PPG has awarded performance-based Market Stock Units (MSUs) with a target value of $1.5 million each to K. Henrik Bergstrom and Kevin Braun. These MSUs will vest on May 8, 2029, and are designed to align executive interests with shareholders and aid in talent retention. The payout is tied to the company's 3-year stock performance and Adjusted EPS goals.

feed.title: BNY Mellon (BK) legal chief sells 30,000 common shares
feed.summary: J. Kevin McCarthy, SEVP & General Counsel of Bank of New York Mellon Corp (BK), sold 30,000 shares of common stock on April 17, 2026, at a weighted average price of $136.4973 per share, totaling approximately $4.09 million. Following this open-market transaction, McCarthy directly holds 50,237.607 shares of the company's common stock. This insider sale was reported via a Form 4 filing, indicating a negative sentiment and high impact by Rhea-AI.

feed.title: Micron Technology Options Spot-On: On April 21st, 320.43K Contracts Were Traded, With 2.51 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: This article reports on the significant options trading activity for Micron Technology (MU) on April 21st, noting that 320.43K contracts were traded with an open interest of 2.51 million. The data suggests substantial investor interest and potential future price movements for the company's stock.

feed.title: BNY Mellon (BK) director Linda Z. Cook granted 1,592 deferred stock units
feed.summary: BNY Mellon (BK) director Linda Z. Cook was granted 1,592 deferred stock units, increasing her total holdings to 37,892.107 units. These units convert to common stock on a 1-for-1 basis and vest on the earlier of the company's 2027 Annual Meeting of Shareholders or one year from the grant date. Upon vesting, they are settled in shares after her directorship ends, and they also accrue dividend equivalents that are reinvested into additional units.

feed.title: Multisensor AI Implements Reverse Stock Split, Adjusts Warrants
feed.summary: Multisensor AI Holdings (MSAI) has completed a 1-for-40 reverse stock split, effective April 13, 2026, which impacted previously issued warrants. This action reset the warrant exercise price to $5.98 and increased the adjusted warrant share count to approximately 4.68 million, clarifying the company's capital structure. MSAI, a company providing AI and sensor-based data solutions, is currently rated a Neutral by Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, due to weak financial performance despite a strong balance sheet.

feed.title: Intuitive sales increase 23% in Q1, da Vinci procedures expected to see double-digit growth in 2026
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical reported strong first-quarter 2026 earnings, surpassing Wall Street expectations with a 23% increase in sales to $2.8 billion and profits of $821.5 million. The company's da Vinci surgical system saw 16% procedure growth, and the Ion endoluminal system grew by 39%. Intuitive anticipates continued double-digit growth for da Vinci procedures in 2026, alongside an increase in installed systems worldwide.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (ISRG) Intuitive Surgical, Inc. Reports Q1 Revenue $2.77B, vs. FactSet Est of $2.62B
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. reported its Q1 revenue of $2.77 billion, surpassing FactSet's estimate of $2.62 billion. The company also posted Q1 adjusted EPS of $2.50 per share, exceeding the FactSet estimate of $2.12. This positive earnings flash indicates strong financial performance for the medical equipment and technology company.

feed.title: Ameriprise Financial Inc expected to post earnings of $10.21 a share - Earnings Preview
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial Inc (AMP) is projected to report earnings of $10.21 per share. This information comes from a Reuters earnings preview. The article is brief, indicating that the company's financial performance forecast is a key piece of news.

feed.title: Metropolitan Bank (NYSE: MCB) Q1 profit jumps as it raises capital
feed.summary: Metropolitan Bank Holding Corp. (NYSE: MCB) reported a significant jump in Q1 2026 net income to $31.4 million, or $2.92 per diluted share, nearly double from the prior year. This strong performance was supported by a 28.3% increase in net interest income and a successful follow-on equity offering that raised approximately $186.8 million in net proceeds, enhancing the bank's capital position. The company also announced an increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.25 per share, reflecting confidence in its continued growth and financial health.

feed.title: STERIS to Host a Conference Call for Fiscal 2026 Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results on May 12, 2026
feed.summary: STERIS announced it will host a conference call on May 12, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET to discuss its fiscal 2026 fourth quarter and full year financial results. A press release with detailed results will be issued after the U.S. market closes on May 11, 2026, and a replay of the call will be available afterward. The company, a global provider of infection prevention products and services, encourages interested parties to listen live or access the replay via its investor relations website or by phone.

feed.title: Intuitive Announces First Quarter Earnings
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (Nasdaq: ISRG) announced strong financial results for the first quarter of 2026, with revenue increasing by 23% to $2.77 billion. This growth was driven by a 17% increase in worldwide procedures and a significant rise in da Vinci and Ion system placements. The company also provided a positive financial outlook for the full year 2026, projecting da Vinci procedure growth of 13.5% to 15.5%.

feed.title: Fifth Third shareholders re-elect board, approve auditor By Investing.com
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp announced that shareholders re-elected all 16 directors to its board and ratified Deloitte & Touche LLP as its independent external auditor for 2026. The bank also approved executive compensation by advisory vote. Fifth Third Bancorp, which currently trades below its InvestingPro Fair Value, recently surpassed Q1 2026 EPS forecasts and closed its acquisition of Comerica, positioning for enhanced financial performance.

feed.title: PSEG declares $0.67 quarterly dividend for second quarter By Investing.com
feed.summary: Public Service Enterprise Group (PSEG) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.67 per share for the second quarter of 2026, payable by June 30, 2026. This marks PSEG's 14th consecutive year of dividend increases, with a current yield of 3.32% and a history of 56 consecutive years of dividend payments. The announcement comes alongside mixed analyst ratings following the company's recent earnings report.

feed.title: Capital One Misses Q1 Estimates — Stock Drops
feed.summary: Capital One (NYSE:COF) missed its Q1 earnings and revenue estimates, causing its stock to drop by 2.86% in after-hours trading. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of $4.42, below the Street's expectation of $4.55, and revenue of $15.23 billion, missing the consensus by 0.83%. Despite the miss, CEO Richard D. Fairbank noted solid top-line growth and strong credit performance, emphasizing the positive progression of the Discover integration.

feed.title: La-Z-Boy sells American Drew and Kincaid casegoods businesses By Investing.com
feed.summary: La-Z-Boy Incorporated announced the sale of its American Drew and Kincaid wholesale casegoods businesses to Banner House to focus on its core North American upholstery business. The transaction, expected to close in mid-May, supports La-Z-Boy's Century Vision strategy and allows for enhanced product selection in its stores. La-Z-Boy, which has a "GOOD" InvestingPro Financial Health score and has consistently raised its dividend for five years, will continue to offer casegoods products in its owned locations.

feed.title: Broadcom (NASDAQ: AVGO) holders back 2026 board slate and pay plan
feed.summary: Broadcom Inc. stockholders approved the 2026 board of directors slate, ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as their independent registered public accounting firm for the fiscal year ending November 1, 2026, and approved the advisory vote on named executive officer compensation during their Annual Meeting on April 20, 2026. All eight director nominees were elected, though Harry L. You received a significant number of votes against him. The approval confirms the company's current governance and compensation practices.

feed.title: Trust tied to TransDigm (NYSE: TDG) director sells and exercises 10K shares
feed.summary: A trust associated with TransDigm director W. Nicholas Howley completed an exercise-and-sell sequence involving 10,132 shares of TransDigm common stock. The trust exercised stock options at strike prices of $66.47 and $50.92 per share and subsequently sold the same number of shares on the open market at weighted-average prices between $1,260 and $1,272. Following these transactions, the trust indirectly holds 31,336.513 shares of TransDigm, indicating a substantial remaining equity position.

feed.title: Magnite (NASDAQ: MGNI) outlines 2026 virtual meeting, board elections and executive pay votes
feed.summary: Magnite Inc. (NASDAQ: MGNI) has detailed the proposals for its 2026 virtual annual meeting scheduled for June 8, 2026. Stockholders will vote on the election of three Class III directors, the ratification of Deloitte & Touche LLP as the independent auditor, an advisory approval of executive compensation, and the frequency of future "say-on-pay" votes, with the board recommending annual frequency. The proxy statement also highlighted the company's strong 2025 financial performance, including record revenue of $714.0 million and Adjusted EBITDA of $232.1 million.

feed.title: Director Gowrappan at BNY Mellon (NYSE: BK) granted 1,592 units
feed.summary: BNY Mellon director Kumara Guru Gowrappan was granted 1,592 deferred stock units, increasing his total holdings to 21,726.015 units. These units, tied to common stock, vest at the earlier of the company's 2027 Annual Meeting or one year from the grant date, and include reinvested dividend equivalents. They will be settled in common shares after his directorship ends.

feed.title: Engineer sues Lockheed Martin over yanked remote work accommodation
feed.summary: A Lockheed Martin engineer, Erin Lynn Jeffreys, has filed a federal lawsuit against the company, alleging that her long-standing remote work accommodation was revoked, her hours were cut, and she faced retaliation after questioning the change. Jeffreys, who has scoliosis and chronic pain, claims the company denied her formal request for accommodation despite a decade of approved remote work, and then reduced her work schedule by 30% while four non-disabled colleagues on the same program remained fully remote. She is seeking reinstatement of her full-time remote work, lost pay, and damages.

feed.title: LAKELAND CLASS ACTION DEADLINE FRIDAY: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. Urges Lakeland Industries, Inc. Investors to Contact the Firm Before April 24th Regarding Their Rights
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. has announced a class action lawsuit against Lakeland Industries, Inc. (NASDAQ: LAKE) for alleged false and misleading statements issued between December 1, 2023, and December 9, 2025. Investors are encouraged to contact the law firm by April 24, 2026, to discuss their rights and apply to be appointed as lead plaintiff. The lawsuit claims that Lakeland overstated the positive impact of its Pacific Helmets and Jolly businesses, concealed significant operational issues, and that its financial guidance was unreliable, leading to a substantial stock price drop.

feed.title: EQT Reports Q1 2026: $3.38B Operating Revenue, $1.49B Net Income, $2.33 Adjusted EPS
feed.summary: EQT reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, with total operating revenues of $3.379 billion, net income of $1.487 billion, and an adjusted diluted EPS of $2.33. The company also generated record quarterly free cash flow attributable to EQT of $1.832 billion and achieved significant balance sheet improvements, including an upgraded Fitch rating to BBB. Operational highlights included strong sales volume, efficient capital deployment, and lower per-unit operating costs.

feed.title: Chubb posts Q1 net income $2.32B, core operating EPS $6.82; premiums up 10.7%
feed.summary: Chubb reported strong first-quarter 2026 financial results, with net income reaching $2.32 billion and core operating EPS at $6.82. The company saw consolidated net premiums written increase by 10.7% to $14.0 billion, driven by significant growth in both P&C and Life segments. Chubb also reported record net investment income and returned $1.52 billion to shareholders through share repurchases and dividends.

feed.title: Director at Bank of New York Mellon (NYSE: BK) receives 1,592 deferred stock units
feed.summary: Bank of New York Mellon Corp director Jeffrey A. Goldstein was granted 1,592 Deferred Stock Units. These units convert 1-for-1 into common stock, increasing his total holdings to 51,090.988 units. The units vest on the earlier of the company’s 2027 Annual Meeting or one year from the grant date, and will be settled in common shares after his service as a director ends.
